segments.text: [Music]
you can now use sonar analysis in
compiler Explorer to keep your code
clean even in the browser
pilot Explorer is great for
experimenting imagine you want to try
out C plus 20 Concepts you might write
something like this now there's no
assembly for us to check here though so
let's add some static asserts
and oh that failed
assertion failed that doesn't tell us
much so let's add sonar
[Music]
notice that even though compilation is
failing we're still getting issues
reported and this is telling us that
requires expression should not contain
unevaluated concept checks or type
predicates
not sure what that means there's even a
link for more information
now this is not a simple topic so it may
take a bit of reading but we should end
up realizing that this is what we've
been trying to do
we can make that change in our code
see that it now compiles with no issues
found
[Music]

fullText: [Music] you can now use sonar analysis in compiler Explorer to keep your code clean even in the browser pilot Explorer is great for experimenting imagine you want to try out C plus 20 Concepts you might write something like this now there's no assembly for us to check here though so let's add some static asserts and oh that failed assertion failed that doesn't tell us much so let's add sonar [Music] notice that even though compilation is failing we're still getting issues reported and this is telling us that requires expression should not contain unevaluated concept checks or type predicates not sure what that means there's even a link for more information now this is not a simple topic so it may take a bit of reading but we should end up realizing that this is what we've been trying to do we can make that change in our code see that it now compiles with no issues found [Music]
